name: Reggae Shark Adventures
overview: Reggae Shark, the Musician/Rasta/Superhero who has saved the Earth from the forces of evil countless times, is now retired in Jamaica. While Reggae Shark enjoys the good life, his old nemesis The Jelly Witch has concocted an evil plan that is certain to bring humanity to its knees. Does Reggae Shark still have what it takes to stop her?
